Backlog

Source: BACKLOG.md

Open, actionable work only. Completed history → CHANGELOG.md; feature inventory & future plans → ROADMAP.md. (Methodology file model — see SESSION_RUNNER.md Phase 0.)

Active

Up Next

Audit follow-ups

(From PED_GV_AUDIT_2026-05-30.md; the audit compute/test items are all resolved — see CHANGELOG.md. Per-item reachability notes and traps live in CLAUDE.md “Project-specific Learnings”.) - [ ] NEW-12 / XARCH-3 — Shiny progress hook. Mostly resolved per the S21 plan §8: reportGV / groupAddAssign are already shiny-free with an injected updateProgress hook; the only real leak getMinParentAge was a dead orphan (removed in Phase 9, S35). Treat as SEPARABLE cleanup.

Tracker reconciliation (open question for the user)

  • The remaining audit follow-ups (XARCH-2..8) are not GitHub issues; the live tracker is #1–#39. Decide whether to file the remaining XARCH items as issues or keep them here. They currently coexist.

On this page

Developed by Michael Raboin, Terry Therneau, Amanda Vinson, R. Mark Sharp, Matthew Schultz, Southwest National Primate Research Center NIH grant P51 RR13986, Oregon National Primate Research Center grant P51 OD011092.
